segments.name: At-Risk Mid-Tier
segments.description: Medium-tenure customers showing signs of disengagement with moderate spending
segments.retention_strategy: Proactive outreach with personalized bundles and satisfaction surveys

segments.name: Loyal Premium
segments.description: Long-tenure, high-spending customers with stable contracts and multiple services
segments.retention_strategy: Provide VIP perks, priority support, and exclusive early-access offers to maintain loyalty

segments.name: New Price-Sensitive
segments.description: Short-tenure customers with lower spending, often on month-to-month contracts
segments.retention_strategy: Offer loyalty discounts and contract upgrade incentives to build commitment early

segments.name: Digital Streamers
segments.description: Customers with high data usage and streaming services, tech-savvy profile
segments.retention_strategy: Enhance digital experience, offer streaming partnerships and data boost packages
